name: Mobile Use
description: iOS simulator workbench with agent-drivable build, install, launch, and UI control.

agent.bootstrap: For detailed usage, call `mcp__deus__read_app_skill({ appId: 'deus.mobile-use' })`. Quick orientation: use `set_active_simulator` + `set_active_project` to pin per-workspace defaults, call `snapshot` before `tap` to get @ref targets, and chain build/install/launch via the composite `run` tool.

requires.name: xcrun
requires.install: Install Xcode from the App Store and run `xcode-select --install`.
